creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ultima
Date: Sun Aug 20 23:00:27 UTC 2017
New revision: 448442
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/448442

Log:
  Currently the following plugins are contained in this plugin bundle:
  * Control VM
    Virtual machine for LV2 Control ports. Features 8 inputs and 8 outputs.
  * CV VM
    Virtual machine for LV2 Control Voltage ports. Features 8 inputs
    and 8 outputs.
  * Audio VM
    Virtual machine for LV2 Audio ports. Features 8 inputs and 8 outputs.
  * Atom VM
    Virtual machine for LV2 Atom event ports. Features 8 inputs and 8 outputs.

  WWW: https://open-music-kontrollers.ch/lv2/vm/

  PR:		221352
  Submitted by:	Yuri Victorovich (maintainer)
  Reviewed by:	matthew (mentor)
  Approved by:	matthew (mentor)
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12090

Changes:
  head/audio/Makefile
  head/audio/vm-lv2/
  head/audio/vm-lv2/Makefile
  head/audio/vm-lv2/distinfo
  head/audio/vm-lv2/files/
  head/audio/vm-lv2/files/patch-pugl_pugl_pugl__x11.c
  head/audio/vm-lv2/pkg-descr
  head/audio/vm-lv2/pkg-plist
